worldData.instructions:
THE CAFE — a universe of worlds

DRAG empty space to pan · Z / X to zoom
HOVER a bubble to hear its name · CLICK to enter

The strongest chant sinks to the middle: bubbles cluster by participation, and newborn worlds glow hot before settling.

MY WORLDS (top right) flips this into your own universe — every world on your deed, drafts included. BREW YOURS starts a new one.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: CAFE: hover-bloom portals, click to step through
